action_set_definitions.name: get_system_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current state of the energy system, including battery levels, market prices, and renewable generation.

action_set_definitions.name: get_disturbance_report
action_set_definitions.description: Identifies the current frequency disturbance category and the mandatory injection requirements for the current step.

action_set_definitions.name: get_hardware_specs
action_set_definitions.description: Provides hardware constraints including maximum discharge rates and thermal safety limits for the battery and grid interface.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_dispatch_decision
action_set_definitions.description: Submits the power setpoints for the current interval. Transitions the environment to the next state.

battery_discharge_kw.description: Power to be discharged from the battery (kW).

grid_import_kw.description: Power to be imported from the grid (kW).

state_description.current_step: The current discrete time step in the simulation (e.g., hour of the year).
state_description.battery_soc_kwh: Current energy stored in the battery system in kilowatt-hours.
state_description.max_battery_capacity_kwh: The maximum energy storage capacity of the battery.
state_description.grid_electricity_price: The current market price of electricity from the grid ($/kWh).
state_description.renewable_gen_kw: The current power being generated from renewable sources (solar/wind) in kilowatts.
state_description.load_demand_kw: The current electricity demand from the facility/consumers in kilowatts.
state_description.cumulative_cost: The total economic cost incurred since the start of the simulation.
